info.title: Security Headers Analyzer API
info.description: Security Headers Analyzer API. Audit HTTP security headers and SSL metadata, returning a security score, grade, missing headers, and recommendations by plan. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Audit HTTP security headers and SSL metadata, returning a security score, grade, missing headers, and recommendations by plan.

url.description: Public HTTP or HTTPS website URL to analyze.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
